George and John

10-Year-Old Builds His OWN Roblox Game?! 🎮 Epic Tower Wars Battle!

Join us as 10-year-old George dives into Tower Wars, the Roblox game he built himself! In this fun and epic tower battle, we face off against waves of enemies 🏰🔥 and even surprise our dad with George's amazing creation. Can a young developer beat his own game? Watch till the end to find out – the final battle will blow your mind! 😃 👍 Remember to hit LIKE & SUBSCRIBE for more kid-friendly gaming adventures. 🔔 Turn on notifications so you don’t miss our next video – we have big surprises coming up! #Roblox #TowerWars #KidDeveloper #GamingForKids

Watch on YouTube

In this fun and epic tower battle, we face off against waves of enemies 🏰🔥 and even surprise our dad with George's amazing creation. Can a young developer beat his own game?
